title: Principal Consultant
description:
As Capco continues its rapid expansion in APAC, we seek a Principal Consultant to join a key initiative with one of our clients. This individual will be responsible for building relationships, as well as overseeing the successful governance, execution and delivery of project deliverables. The successful candidate will have come from a strong consulting background, with a wealth of experience delivering initiatives such as:

  • Account Management
  • Programme Management / Office (PMO)
  • Target Operating Model Development
  • Business Case Development
  • Digital Propositions

An understanding of consulting methodologies within the financial services industry whether strategy, business case development, process mapping, lifecycle of project implementation, requirements gathering, or competitive assessment is an important factor for success in this role.

Requirement

  • At least 6 years’ relevant experience in Financial Services, with a significant portion in Consulting
  • Excellent stakeholder management skills and able to traverse complex organization structures
  • Network of Financial Services clients with the ability to leverage and win business with them
  • Business and Financial acumen
  • Deep domain expertise in at least one of the following areas:
  1. Capital Markets
  2. Wealth & Asset Management / Private Bank
  3. Risk / Regulatory Compliance
  4. Investment Banking
  5. Commercial Banking
  • Strong presentation skills, extensive experience writing successful project proposals, business case development, experience planning and executing projects
  • A track record in leading large diverse teams to implement transformation and optimisation projects and initiatives within banks on regional and global basis
  • Ability to coach, mentor, attract and retain talent
  • Strong Business Analysis and Project Management background
  • Knowledge of the following methodologies / qualifications are also highly advantageous:
  1. PMP
  2. Prince2
  3. Agile

postedCompany.description:
CAPCO CONSULTING SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

 

Capco, a global business and technology consultancy dedicated solely to the financial services industry. Our professionals combine innovative thinking with our unrivalled first-hand industry knowledge to offer our clients consulting expertise, complex technology and package integration, and managed services to move their organizations forward.

Through our collaborative and efficient approach, we help our clients successfully increase revenue, manage risk and regulatory change, reduce costs and enhance control. We specialize in banking; capital markets; wealth and investment management; finance, risk & compliance; and technology.
postedCompany.name: CAPCO CONSULTING SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
